- [**ComfyUI-WanVideoWrapper**](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-WanVideoWrapper) (⭐6224 +5) *pushed a month ago*: ComfyUI wrapper nodes for [a/WanVideo](https://github.com/Wan-Video/Wan2.1) and related models.
- [**ID-LoRA-LTX2.3-ComfyUI**](https://github.com/ID-LoRA/ID-LoRA-LTX2.3-ComfyUI) (⭐72 +5) *pushed a day ago*: ComfyUI nodes for ID-LoRA-2.3 one-stage audio+video generation with speaker identity transfer
- [**RES4LYF**](https://github.com/ClownsharkBatwing/RES4LYF) (⭐1041 +4) *pushed 2 months ago*: Advanced samplers with new noise scaling math to enable SDE sampling with all publicly available native models; new unsampling/noise inversion methods and other advanced img2img techniques for inpainting and/or guiding the sampling process with guide images, with results superior to FlowEdit, RF Inversion, and other SOTA implementations. Also new style transfer methods unique to this node pack; regional conditioning for HiDream, Flux, AuraFlow, and WAN; methods for eliminating Flux blur; and temporal conditioning (shift gradually from one prompt to the next with video). 115 sampler types, 24 noise types, 11 noise scaling modes, in a single node. Also includes a wide variety of QoF and other utility nodes for boosting detail, manipulating sigmas, latents, images, and more.
- [**WeiLin-Comfyui-Tools**](https://github.com/weilin9999/WeiLin-Comfyui-Tools) (⭐420 +4) *pushed 6 days ago*: quickly use the prompt word tool in ComfyUI
- [**ComfyUI-Chord**](https://github.com/ubisoft/ComfyUI-Chord) (⭐347 +4) *pushed 11 days ago*: Custom nodes for the paper: Chord: Chain of Rendering Decomposition for PBR Material Estimation from Generated Texture Images
- [**ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus**](https://github.com/cubiq/ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus) (⭐5862 +3) *pushed 11 months ago*: ComfyUI reference implementation for IPAdapter models. The code is mostly taken from the original IPAdapter repository and laksjdjf's implementation, all credit goes to them. I just made the extension closer to ComfyUI philosophy.
- [**ComfyUI Easy Use**](https://github.com/yolain/ComfyUI-Easy-Use) (⭐2424 +3) *pushed 7 days ago*: To enhance the usability of ComfyUI, optimizations and integrations have been implemented for several commonly used nodes.
- [**ComfyUI-QwenVL**](https://github.com/1038lab/ComfyUI-QwenVL) (⭐710 +3) *pushed a month ago*: ComfyUI-QwenVL custom node: Integrates the Qwen-VL series, including Qwen2.5-VL and the latest Qwen3-VL, to enable advanced multimodal AI for text generation, image understanding, and video analysis.
- [**ComfyUI-SeedVR2_VideoUpscaler**](https://github.com/numz/ComfyUI-SeedVR2_VideoUpscaler) (⭐2262 +3) *pushed 3 months ago*: Welcome to the ComfyUI-SeedVR2 Video Upscaler repository! - [**LanPaint**](https://github.com/scraed/LanPaint) (⭐1074 +3) *pushed 19 hours ago*: Achieve seamless inpainting results without needing a specialized inpainting model.

- [**Crystools**](https://github.com/crystian/ComfyUI-Crystools) (⭐1818 +11) *pushed 4 months ago*: With this suit, you can see the resources monitor, progress bar & time elapsed, metadata and compare between two images, compare between two JSONs, show any value to console/display, pipes, and more!
- [**comfyui_LLM_party**](https://github.com/heshengtao/comfyui_LLM_party) (⭐2150 +11) *pushed 18 days ago*: A set of block-based LLM agent node libraries designed for ComfyUI.This project aims to develop a complete set of nodes for LLM workflow construction based on comfyui. It allows users to quickly and conveniently build their own LLM workflows and easily integrate them into their existing SD workflows.
- [**VNCCS - Visual Novel Character Creation Suite**](https://github.com/AHEKOT/ComfyUI_VNCCS) (⭐835 +11) *pushed 7 days ago*: VNCCS is a comprehensive tool for creating character sprites for visual novels.
- [**ComfyUI-Inpaint-CropAndStitch**](https://github.com/lquesada/ComfyUI-Inpaint-CropAndStitch) (⭐1011 +10) *pushed 9 days ago*: '✂️ Inpaint Crop' is a node that crops an image before sampling. The context area can be specified via the mask, expand pixels and expand factor or via a separate (optional) mask.
- [**VideoX-Fun**](https://github.com/aigc-apps/VideoX-Fun) (⭐1980 +10) *pushed a day ago*: VideoX-Fun is a video generation pipeline that can be used to generate AI images and videos, as well as to train baseline and Lora models for Diffusion Transformer. We support direct prediction from pre-trained baseline models to generate videos with different resolutions, durations, and FPS. Additionally, we also support users in training their own baseline and Lora models to perform specific style transformations.
- [**AnimateDiff Evolved**](https://github.com/Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-AnimateDiff-Evolved) (⭐3420 +9) *pushed 7 months ago*: A forked repository that actively maintains [a/AnimateDiff](https://github.com/ArtVentureX/comfyui-animatediff), created by ArtVentureX.
- [**ComfyUI-MultiGPU**](https://github.com/pollockjj/ComfyUI-MultiGPU) (⭐833 +9) *pushed 5 days ago*: This extension adds CUDA device selection to supported loader nodes in ComfyUI. By monkey-patching ComfyUI’s memory management, each model component (like UNet, Clip, or VAE) can be loaded on a specific GPU. Examples included are multi-GPU workflows for SDXL, FLUX, LTXVideo, and Hunyuan Video for both standard and GGUF loader nodes.
- [**ComfyUI-nunchaku**](https://github.com/nunchaku-tech/ComfyUI-nunchaku) (⭐2819 +9) *pushed a month ago*: Nunchaku ComfyUI Node. Nunchaku is the inference that supports SVDQuant. SVDQuant is a new post-training training quantization paradigm for diffusion models, which quantize both the weights and activations of FLUX.1 to 4 bits, achieving 3.5× memory and 8.7× latency reduction on a 16GB laptop 4090 GPU. See more details: https://github.com/mit-han-lab/nunchaku
- [**ComfyUI-Flux2Klein-Enhancer**](https://github.com/capitan01R/ComfyUI-Flux2Klein-Enhancer) (⭐156 +9) *pushed a day ago*: Conditioning enhancement node for FLUX.2 Klein 9B in ComfyUI. Controls prompt adherence and image edit behavior by modifying the active text embedding region.
- [**Efficiency Nodes for ComfyUI Version 2.0+**](https://github.com/jags111/efficiency-nodes-comfyui) (⭐1448 +8) *pushed a month ago*: A collection of ComfyUI custom nodes to help streamline workflows and reduce total node count.[w/NOTE: This node is originally created by LucianoCirino, but the [a/original repository](https://github.com/LucianoCirino/efficiency-nodes-comfyui) is no longer maintained and has been forked by a new maintainer. To use the forked version, you should uninstall the original version and **REINSTALL** this one.]
- [**ComfyUI-3D-Pack**](https://github.com/MrForExample/ComfyUI-3D-Pack) (⭐3685 +8) *pushed 2 months ago*: Make 3D assets generation in ComfyUI good and convenient as it generates image/video!
- [**SD-PPP**](https://github.com/zombieyang/sd-ppp) (⭐1999 +8) *pushed a month ago*: Simplify ComfyUI to WebUI-liked interface and Connect with Photoshop.
- [**ComfyUI-DD-Translation**](https://github.com/Dontdrunk/ComfyUI-DD-Translation) (⭐745 +8) *pushed a day ago*: A plugin offering supplementary Chinese translations for ComfyUI custom nodes.
- [**Realtime LoRA Trainer**](https://github.com/ShootTheSound/comfyUI-Realtime-Lora) (⭐440 +8) *pushed 6 days ago*: Train and Block Edit and Save LoRAs directly inside ComfyUI. Supports SDXL (via sd-scripts), FLUX, Z-Image Turbo, and Wan 2.2 (via Musubi Tuner and AI-Toolkit).
- [**ComfyUI-Flux2-INT8**](https://github.com/BobJohnson24/ComfyUI-Flux2-INT8) (⭐49 +8) *pushed 16 hours ago*: This node speeds up Flux2, Chroma, Z-Image in ComfyUI by using INT8 quantization, delivering ~2x faster inference on my 3090, but it should work on any NVIDIA GPU with enough INT8 TOPS.
- [**ComfyUI-Florence2**](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-Florence2) (⭐1645 +7) *pushed 5 days ago*: Nodes to use Florence2 VLM for image vision tasks: object detection, captioning, segmentation and ocr
- [**ComfyUI_LayerStyle_Advance**](https://github.com/chflame163/ComfyUI_LayerStyle_Advance) (⭐634 +7) *pushed a month ago*: The nodes detached from ComfyUI Layer Style are mainly those with complex requirements for dependency packages.
- [**ComfyUI to Python Extension**](https://github.com/pydn/ComfyUI-to-Python-Extension) (⭐2291 +7) *pushed 4 days ago*: This custom node allows you to generate pure python code from your ComfyUI workflow with the click of a button. Great for rapid experimentation or production deployment.
- [**ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes**](https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes) (⭐190 +7) *pushed 4 hours ago*: A set of ComfyUI nodes designed and fine-tuned specifically for the Z-Image model. Pushing the best image generation model to its limits!
- [**ComfyUI-Autocomplete-Plus**](https://github.com/newtextdoc1111/ComfyUI-Autocomplete-Plus) (⭐131 +7) *pushed a month ago*: Autocomplete and Related Tag display for ComfyUI

- [**Realtime LoRA Trainer**](https://github.com/ShootTheSound/comfyUI-Realtime-Lora) (⭐440) *pushed 6 days ago*: Train and Block Edit and Save LoRAs directly inside ComfyUI. Supports SDXL (via sd-scripts), FLUX, Z-Image Turbo, and Wan 2.2 (via Musubi Tuner and AI-Toolkit).
- [**ComfyUI-ExternalAPI-Helpers**](https://github.com/Aryan185/ComfyUI-ExternalAPI-Helpers) (⭐9) *pushed 6 days ago*: ComfyUI node for Flux Kontext Pro and Max models from Replicate
- [**ComfyUI-Lightx2vWrapper**](https://github.com/ModelTC/ComfyUI-Lightx2vWrapper) (⭐79) *pushed 6 days ago*: ComfyUI-Lightx2vWrapper is an inference wrapper for Lightx2v designed for use with ComfyUI.
- [**ComfyUI-Simple-Prompt**](https://github.com/0nikod/ComfyUI-Simple-Prompt) (⭐1) *pushed 6 days ago*: Provide a simple interface to simplify prompt writing.

## Workflows trending in 14 days

- [**FastVideo**](https://github.com/hao-ai-lab/FastVideo) (⭐3317 +167) *pushed 4 hours ago*: A custom node suite for ComfyUI that provides accelerated multi-GPU video generation using [a/FastVideo](https://github.com/hao-ai-lab/FastVideo).
- [**ComfyUI-Manager**](https://github.com/ltdrdata/ComfyUI-Manager) (⭐14042 +153) *pushed 4 hours ago*: ComfyUI-Manager itself is also a custom node.
- [**ComfyUI-LTXVideo**](https://github.com/Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo) (⭐3355 +101) *pushed 20 days ago*: Custom nodes for LTX-Video support in ComfyUI
- [**ComfyUI-Copilot**](https://github.com/AIDC-AI/ComfyUI-Copilot) (⭐4802 +99) *pushed 2 months ago*: Your Intelligent Assistant for Comfy-UI.
- [**ComfyUI-SeedVR2_VideoUpscaler**](https://github.com/numz/ComfyUI-SeedVR2_VideoUpscaler) (⭐2262 +75) *pushed 3 months ago*: Welcome to the ComfyUI-SeedVR2 Video Upscaler repository! This project offers a non-official video upscaling tool designed specifically for ComfyUI. With this tool, you can enhance your video quality, making your visual content more engaging and clearer.
- [**ComfyUI-MatAnyone**](https://github.com/FuouM/ComfyUI-MatAnyone) (⭐86 +64) *pushed 11 days ago*: MatAnyone in ComfyUI (Remove background)
- [**ComfyUI-WanVideoWrapper**](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-WanVideoWrapper) (⭐6224 +62) *pushed a month ago*: ComfyUI wrapper nodes for [a/WanVideo](https://github.com/Wan-Video/Wan2.1) and related models.
- [**rgthree's ComfyUI Nodes**](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy) (⭐2921 +58) *pushed 3 months ago*: Nodes: Seed, Reroute, Context, Lora Loader Stack, Context Switch, Fast Muter. These custom nodes helps organize the building of complex workflows.
- [**ComfyUI-GGUF**](https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF) (⭐3417 +47) *pushed 2 months ago*: GGUF Quantization support for native ComfyUI models
- [**KJNodes for ComfyUI**](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) (⭐2438 +47) *pushed 3 days ago*: Various quality of life -nodes for ComfyUI, mostly just visual stuff to improve usability.
- [**ComfyUI-Chord**](https://github.com/ubisoft/ComfyUI-Chord) (⭐347 +46) *pushed 11 days ago*: Custom nodes for the paper: Chord: Chain of Rendering Decomposition for PBR Material Estimation from Generated Texture Images
- [**TTS Audio Suite**](https://github.com/diodiogod/TTS-Audio-Suite) (⭐792 +45) *pushed 5 days ago*: TTS Audio Suite - Universal multi-engine TTS extension for ComfyUI with unified architecture supporting ChatterBox, F5-TTS, and future engines like RVC. Features modular engine adapters, character voice management, comprehensive SRT subtitle support, and advanced audio processing capabilities.
- [**ComfyUI-RMBG**](https://github.com/1038lab/ComfyUI-RMBG) (⭐1842 +43) *pushed a month ago*: A sophisticated ComfyUI custom node engineered for advanced image background removal and precise segmentation of objects, faces, clothing, and fashion elements. This tool leverages a diverse array of models, including RMBG-2.0, INSPYRENET, BEN, BEN2, BiRefNet models, SAM, and GroundingDINO, while also incorporating a new feature for real-time background replacement and enhanced edge detection for improved accuracy.
- [**ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus**](https://github.com/cubiq/ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus) (⭐5862 +38) *pushed 11 months ago*: ComfyUI reference implementation for IPAdapter models. The code is mostly taken from the original IPAdapter repository and laksjdjf's implementation, all credit goes to them. I just made the extension closer to ComfyUI philosophy.
- [**ComfyUI-qwenmultiangle**](https://github.com/jtydhr88/ComfyUI-qwenmultiangle) (⭐1031 +36) *pushed 2 days ago*: A ComfyUI node for 3D camera angle control, outputs angle prompts for multi-angle image generation
- [**ComfyUI-Lora-Manager**](https://github.com/willmiao/ComfyUI-Lora-Manager) (⭐1042 +35) *pushed 13 hours ago*: Revolutionize your workflow with the ultimate LoRA companion for ComfyUI!
- [**ComfyUI-Trellis2**](https://github.com/visualbruno/ComfyUI-Trellis2) (⭐388 +35) *pushed 3 days ago*: ComfyUI Wrapper for TRELLIS.2 - Microsoft's image-to-3D generation model. (Description by CC)
- [**RES4LYF**](https://github.com/ClownsharkBatwing/RES4LYF) (⭐1041 +34) *pushed 2 months ago*: Advanced samplers with new noise scaling math to enable SDE sampling with all publicly available native models; new unsampling/noise inversion methods and other advanced img2img techniques for inpainting and/or guiding the sampling process with guide images, with results superior to FlowEdit, RF Inversion, and other SOTA implementations. Also new style transfer methods unique to this node pack; regional conditioning for HiDream, Flux, AuraFlow, and WAN; methods for eliminating Flux blur; and temporal conditioning (shift gradually from one prompt to the next with video). 115 sampler types, 24 noise types, 11 noise scaling modes, in a single node. Also includes a wide variety of QoF and other utility nodes for boosting detail, manipulating sigmas, latents, images, and more.
- [**ComfyUI Easy Use**](https://github.com/yolain/ComfyUI-Easy-Use) (⭐2424 +33) *pushed 7 days ago*: To enhance the usability of ComfyUI, optimizations and integrations have been implemented for several commonly used nodes.
- [**VRGameDevGirl Video Enhancement Nodes**](https://github.com/vrgamegirl19/comfyui-vrgamedevgirl) (⭐334 +33) *pushed 4 days ago*: Film grain and color match nodes designed for high-quality frame-by-frame video enhancement in ComfyUI.
- [**ComfyUI's ControlNet Auxiliary Preprocessors**](https://github.com/Fannovel16/comfyui_controlnet_aux) (⭐3874 +30) *pushed a month ago*: Plug-and-play ComfyUI node sets for making ControlNet hint images.
- [**comfyui-reactor-node**](https://github.com/Gourieff/ComfyUI-ReActor) (⭐1142 +29) *pushed 3 months ago*: The Fast and Simple Face Swap Extension Node for ComfyUI, based on ReActor SD-WebUI Face Swap Extension
- [**ComfyUI Impact Pack**](https://github.com/ltdrdata/ComfyUI-Impact-Pack) (⭐3027 +27) *pushed 2 months ago*: This node pack offers various detector nodes and detailer nodes that allow you to configure a workflow that automatically enhances facial details. And provide iterative upscaler.
- [**comfyui-photoshop**](https://github.com/NimaNzrii/comfyui-photoshop) (⭐1563 +26) *pushed a month ago*: Powerfull bridge to Photoshop by NimaNzrii
- [**LanPaint**](https://github.com/scraed/LanPaint) (⭐1074 +25) *pushed 19 hours ago*: Achieve seamless inpainting results without needing a specialized inpainting model.
- [**ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite**](https://github.com/Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite) (⭐1560 +24) *pushed 9 days ago*: Nodes related to video workflows
- [**ComfyUI-YCNodes_Toolkit**](https://github.com/yichengup/ComfyUI-YCNodes_Toolkit) (⭐45 +24) *pushed 3 days ago*: ComfyUI toolkit with custom nodes for BBox canvas visualization, image brush mask drawing, and coordinate annotation for debugging and external data bridging. (Description by CC)
- [**ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes**](https://github.com/martin-rizzo/ComfyUI-ZImagePowerNodes) (⭐190 +24) *pushed 4 hours ago*: A set of ComfyUI nodes designed and fine-tuned specifically for the Z-Image model. Pushing the best image generation model to its limits!
- [**VNCCS - Visual Novel Character Creation Suite**](https://github.com/AHEKOT/ComfyUI_VNCCS) (⭐835 +24) *pushed 7 days ago*: VNCCS is a comprehensive tool for creating character sprites for visual novels.
- [**ComfyUI Layer Style**](https://github.com/chflame163/ComfyUI_LayerStyle) (⭐2954 +23) *pushed a month ago*: A set of nodes for ComfyUI it generate image like Adobe Photoshop's Layer Style. the Drop Shadow is first completed node, and follow-up work is in progress.
- [**ComfyUI-QwenVL**](https://github.com/1038lab/ComfyUI-QwenVL) (⭐710 +23) *pushed a month ago*: ComfyUI-QwenVL custom node: Integrates the Qwen-VL series, including Qwen2.5-VL and the latest Qwen3-VL, to enable advanced multimodal AI for text generation, image understanding, and video analysis.
- [**Forbidden Vision**](https://github.com/luxdelux7/ComfyUI-Forbidden-Vision) (⭐75 +23) *pushed 4 days ago*: Custom face detection and segmentation for ComfyUI with automatic face fixing, intelligent color grading, and iterative refinement. Custom-trained models optimized for realistic, anime, and NSFW content.
- [**ComfyUI-FlashVSR_Ultra_Fast**](https://github.com/lihaoyun6/ComfyUI-FlashVSR_Ultra_Fast) (⭐709 +22) *pushed 4 months ago*: Running FlashVSR on lower VRAM without any artifacts.
- [**comfyui-comfysketch**](https://github.com/Mexes1978/comfyui-comfysketch) (⭐112 +22) *pushed 13 days ago*: A drawing and sketching node for ComfyUI with layers, multiple brush types, and a focused, professional interface.
- [**ComfyUI FLOAT**](https://github.com/yuvraj108c/ComfyUI-FLOAT) (⭐264 +21) *pushed 2 months ago*: This project provides an unofficial ComfyUI implementation of [a/FLOAT](https://github.com/deepbrainai-research/float) for Generative Motion Latent Flow Matching for Audio-driven Talking Portrait
- [**comfyui_LLM_party**](https://github.com/heshengtao/comfyui_LLM_party) (⭐2150 +20) *pushed 18 days ago*: A set of block-based LLM agent node libraries designed for ComfyUI.This project aims to develop a complete set of nodes for LLM workflow construction based on comfyui. It allows users to quickly and conveniently build their own LLM workflows and easily integrate them into their existing SD workflows.
- [**WeiLin-Comfyui-Tools**](https://github.com/weilin9999/WeiLin-Comfyui-Tools) (⭐420 +20) *pushed 6 days ago*: quickly use the prompt word tool in ComfyUI
- [**VideoX-Fun**](https://github.com/aigc-apps/VideoX-Fun) (⭐1980 +20) *pushed a day ago*: VideoX-Fun is a video generation pipeline that can be used to generate AI images and videos, as well as to train baseline and Lora models for Diffusion Transformer. We support direct prediction from pre-trained baseline models to generate videos with different resolutions, durations, and FPS. Additionally, we also support users in training their own baseline and Lora models to perform specific style transformations.
- [**ComfyUI-SAM3**](https://github.com/PozzettiAndrea/ComfyUI-SAM3) (⭐485 +20) *pushed 12 days ago*: ComfyUI integration for Meta's SAM3 model enabling open-vocabulary image segmentation using natural language text prompts, with automatic model download, geometric refinement, and flexible confidence thresholds.
- [**ComfyUI-Inpaint-CropAndStitch**](https://github.com/lquesada/ComfyUI-Inpaint-CropAndStitch) (⭐1011 +19) *pushed 9 days ago*: '✂️ Inpaint Crop' is a node that crops an image before sampling. The context area can be specified via the mask, expand pixels and expand factor or via a separate (optional) mask.
- [**ComfyUI-nunchaku**](https://github.com/nunchaku-tech/ComfyUI-nunchaku) (⭐2819 +19) *pushed a month ago*: Nunchaku ComfyUI Node. Nunchaku is the inference that supports SVDQuant. SVDQuant is a new post-training training quantization paradigm for diffusion models, which quantize both the weights and activations of FLUX.1 to 4 bits, achieving 3.5× memory and 8.7× latency reduction on a 16GB laptop 4090 GPU. See more details: https://github.com/mit-han-lab/nunchaku
- [**ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts**](https://github.com/pythongosssss/ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts) (⭐3011 +18) *pushed a month ago*: Enhancements & experiments for ComfyUI, mostly focusing on UI features
- [**ComfyUI-MelBandRoFormer**](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-MelBandRoFormer) (⭐175 +18) *pushed a month ago*: Mel-Band RoFormer for Music Source Separation
- [**Crystools**](https://github.com/crystian/ComfyUI-Crystools) (⭐1818 +17) *pushed 4 months ago*: With this suit, you can see the resources monitor, progress bar & time elapsed, metadata and compare between two images, compare between two JSONs, show any value to console/display, pipes, and more!
- [**ComfyUI-3D-Pack**](https://github.com/MrForExample/ComfyUI-3D-Pack) (⭐3685 +17) *pushed 2 months ago*: Make 3D assets generation in ComfyUI good and convenient as it generates image/video!
- [**SD-PPP**](https://github.com/zombieyang/sd-ppp) (⭐1999 +17) *pushed a month ago*: Simplify ComfyUI to WebUI-liked interface and Connect with Photoshop.
- [**RyanOnTheInside**](https://github.com/ryanontheinside/ComfyUI_RyanOnTheInside) (⭐767 +17) *pushed 6 days ago*: Custom nodes introducing particle simulations, optical flow, audio manipulation & reactivity, and temporal masks
- [**ComfyUI_RH_APICall**](https://github.com/HM-RunningHub/ComfyUI_RH_APICall) (⭐247 +17) *pushed 9 days ago*: This is a ComfyUI plugin that makes it easier to call and run workflows from RunningHub in your local ComfyUI setup.
- [**ComfyUI to Python Extension**](https://github.com/pydn/ComfyUI-to-Python-Extension) (⭐2291 +16) *pushed 4 days ago*: This custom node allows you to generate pure python code from your ComfyUI workflow with the click of a button. Great for rapid experimentation or production deployment.
- [**ComfyUI-DepthAnythingV3**](https://github.com/PozzettiAndrea/ComfyUI-DepthAnythingV3) (⭐370 +16) *pushed 22 days ago*: ComfyUI nodes to use Depth Anything V3 - the latest depth estimation model from ByteDance. For now monocular depth, camera pose estimation and 3D point clouds/gaussians are supported. Models autodownload from HuggingFace (depth-anything org). This is a first draft, let me know if you have any feedback! :)
- [**ComfyUI-MultiGPU**](https://github.com/pollockjj/ComfyUI-MultiGPU) (⭐833 +15) *pushed 5 days ago*: This extension adds CUDA device selection to supported loader nodes in ComfyUI. By monkey-patching ComfyUI’s memory management, each model component (like UNet, Clip, or VAE) can be loaded on a specific GPU. Examples included are multi-GPU workflows for SDXL, FLUX, LTXVideo, and Hunyuan Video for both standard and GGUF loader nodes.
- [**Efficiency Nodes for ComfyUI Version 2.0+**](https://github.com/jags111/efficiency-nodes-comfyui) (⭐1448 +14) *pushed a month ago*: A collection of ComfyUI custom nodes to help streamline workflows and reduce total node count.[w/NOTE: This node is originally created by LucianoCirino, but the [a/original repository](https://github.com/LucianoCirino/efficiency-nodes-comfyui) is no longer maintained and has been forked by a new maintainer. To use the forked version, you should uninstall the original version and **REINSTALL** this one.]
- [**ComfyUI-Florence2**](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-Florence2) (⭐1645 +14) *pushed 5 days ago*: Nodes to use Florence2 VLM for image vision tasks: object detection, captioning, segmentation and ocr

SVDQuant is a new post-training training quantization paradigm for diffusion models, which quantize both the weights and activations of FLUX.1 to 4 bits, achieving 3.5× memory and 8.7× latency reduction on a 16GB laptop 4090 GPU. See more details: https://github.com/mit-han-lab/nunchaku
- [**Crystools**](https://github.com/crystian/ComfyUI-Crystools) (⭐1818 +37) *pushed 4 months ago*: With this suit, you can see the resources monitor, progress bar & time elapsed, metadata and compare between two images, compare between two JSONs, show any value to console/display, pipes, and more!
- [**ComfyUI-DD-Translation**](https://github.com/Dontdrunk/ComfyUI-DD-Translation) (⭐745 +37) *pushed a day ago*: A plugin offering supplementary Chinese translations for ComfyUI custom nodes.
- [**ComfyUI-FlashVSR_Ultra_Fast**](https://github.com/lihaoyun6/ComfyUI-FlashVSR_Ultra_Fast) (⭐709 +36) *pushed 4 months ago*: Running FlashVSR on lower VRAM without any artifacts.
- [**ComfyUI-Sharp**](https://github.com/PozzettiAndrea/ComfyUI-Sharp) (⭐292 +35) *pushed 14 days ago*: SHARP integration for ComfyUI - Monocular 3D Gaussian Splatting in under 1 second. Generate 3D Gaussians from a single image using Apple's SHARP model.
- [**ComfyUI_RH_APICall**](https://github.com/HM-RunningHub/ComfyUI_RH_APICall) (⭐247 +34) *pushed 9 days ago*: This is a ComfyUI plugin that makes it easier to call and run workflows from RunningHub in your local ComfyUI setup.
- [**WeiLin-Comfyui-Tools**](https://github.com/weilin9999/WeiLin-Comfyui-Tools) (⭐420 +32) *pushed 6 days ago*: quickly use the prompt word tool in ComfyUI
- [**ComfyUI-MultiGPU**](https://github.com/pollockjj/ComfyUI-MultiGPU) (⭐833 +32) *pushed 5 days ago*: This extension adds CUDA device selection to supported loader nodes in ComfyUI. By monkey-patching ComfyUI’s memory management, each model component (like UNet, Clip, or VAE) can be loaded on a specific GPU. Examples included are multi-GPU workflows for SDXL, FLUX, LTXVideo, and Hunyuan Video for both standard and GGUF loader nodes.
- [**IAMCCS-nodes**](https://github.com/IAMCCS/IAMCCS-nodes) (⭐76 +32) *pushed 2 days ago*: Custom nodes by IAMCCS, including a critical fix for LoRA loading in native WANAnimate workflows, especially useful for advanced models like FLUX and WAN 2.1. This bypasses the need for the WanVideoWrapper for LoRA functionality.
- [**ComfyUI-DepthAnythingV3**](https://github.com/PozzettiAndrea/ComfyUI-DepthAnythingV3) (⭐370 +32) *pushed 22 days ago*: ComfyUI nodes to use Depth Anything V3 - the latest depth estimation model from ByteDance. For now monocular depth, camera pose estimation and 3D point clouds/gaussians are supported. Models autodownload from HuggingFace (depth-anything org). This is a first draft, let me know if you have any feedback! :)
- [**UltimateSDUpscale**](https://github.com/ssitu/ComfyUI_UltimateSDUpscale) (⭐1475 +31) *pushed 27 days ago*: ComfyUI nodes for the Ultimate Stable Diffusion Upscale script by Coyote-A.
- [**ComfyUI-Inpaint-CropAndStitch**](https://github.com/lquesada/ComfyUI-Inpaint-CropAndStitch) (⭐1011 +31) *pushed 9 days ago*: '✂️ Inpaint Crop' is a node that crops an image before sampling. The context area can be specified via the mask, expand pixels and expand factor or via a separate (optional) mask.
- [**audio-separation-nodes-comfyui**](https://github.com/christian-byrne/audio-separation-nodes-comfyui) (⭐479 +31) *pushed 3 months ago*: Separate audio track into stems (vocals, bass, drums, other). Along with tools to recombine, tempo match, slice/crop audio.
- [**ACE-Step-ComfyUI**](https://github.com/ace-step/ACE-Step-ComfyUI) (⭐46 +31) *pushed 25 days ago*: Official ComfyUI node for ACE-Step AI music generation via ACE-Step API
- [**ComfyUI Frame Interpolation**](https://github.com/Fannovel16/ComfyUI-Frame-Interpolation) (⭐998 +30) *pushed 4 days ago*: A custom node suite for Video Frame Interpolation in ComfyUI
- [**Realtime LoRA Trainer**](https://github.com/ShootTheSound/comfyUI-Realtime-Lora) (⭐440 +30) *pushed 6 days ago*: Train and Block Edit and Save LoRAs directly inside ComfyUI. Supports SDXL (via sd-scripts), FLUX, Z-Image Turbo, and Wan 2.2 (via Musubi Tuner and AI-Toolkit).

- [**ComfyUI-Lora-Manager**](https://github.com/willmiao/ComfyUI-Lora-Manager) (⭐1042 *pushed 13 hours ago, created 1 year, 1 month ago, issues 132*): Revolutionize your workflow with the ultimate LoRA companion for ComfyUI!
- [**RES4LYF**](https://github.com/ClownsharkBatwing/RES4LYF) (⭐1041 *pushed 2 months ago, created 1 year, 9 months ago, issues 117*): Advanced samplers with new noise scaling math to enable SDE sampling with all publicly available native models; new unsampling/noise inversion methods and other advanced img2img techniques for inpainting and/or guiding the sampling process with guide images, with results superior to FlowEdit, RF Inversion, and other SOTA implementations. Also new style transfer methods unique to this node pack; regional conditioning for HiDream, Flux, AuraFlow, and WAN; methods for eliminating Flux blur; and temporal conditioning (shift gradually from one prompt to the next with video). 115 sampler types, 24 noise types, 11 noise scaling modes, in a single node. Also includes a wide variety of QoF and other utility nodes for boosting detail, manipulating sigmas, latents, images, and more.
- [**ComfyUI-qwenmultiangle**](https://github.com/jtydhr88/ComfyUI-qwenmultiangle) (⭐1031 *pushed 2 days ago, created 2 months ago, issues 3*): A ComfyUI node for 3D camera angle control, outputs angle prompts for multi-angle image generation

- [**ComfyUI Frame Interpolation**](https://github.com/Fannovel16/ComfyUI-Frame-Interpolation) (⭐998 *pushed 4 days ago, created 2 years ago, issues 63*): A custom node suite for Video Frame Interpolation in ComfyUI

- [**Comfyui_TTP_Toolset**](https://github.com/TTPlanetPig/Comfyui_TTP_Toolset) (⭐961 *pushed 2 months ago, created 1 year, 7 months ago, issues 41*): This is a workflow for my simple logic amazing upscale node for DIT model. it can be common use for Flux,Hunyuan,SD3 It can simple tile the initial image into pieces and then use image-interrogator to get each tile prompts for more accurate upscale process. - [**Use Everywhere (UE Nodes)**](https://github.com/chrisgoringe/cg-use-everywhere) (⭐959 *pushed a day ago, created 2 years ago, issues 9*): A set of nodes that allow data to be 'broadcast' to some or all unconnected inputs. Greatly reduces link spaghetti.
- [**ComfyUI-Advanced-ControlNet**](https://github.com/Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-Advanced-ControlNet) (⭐956 *pushed 7 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 36*): Nodes for scheduling ControlNet strength across timesteps and batched latents, as well as applying custom weights and attention masks.
- [**ComfyUI-Detail-Daemon**](https://github.com/Jonseed/ComfyUI-Detail-Daemon) (⭐942 *pushed 3 months ago, created 1 year, 4 months ago, issues 4*): A port of muerrilla's [a/sd-webui-Detail-Daemon](https://github.com/muerrilla/sd-webui-detail-daemon) as a node for ComfyUI, to adjust sigmas that control detail.
- [**ComfyUI-LatentSyncWrapper**](https://github.com/ShmuelRonen/ComfyUI-LatentSyncWrapper) (⭐941 *pushed 6 months ago, created 1 year, 2 months ago, issues 62*): This node provides lip-sync capabilities in ComfyUI using ByteDance's LatentSync model. It allows you to synchronize video lips with audio input.
- [**BrushNet**](https://github.com/nullquant/ComfyUI-BrushNet) (⭐940 *pushed 11 months ago, created 1 year, 11 months ago, issues 63*): These are custom nodes for ComfyUI native implementation of [a/BrushNet](https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.06976) (inpaint), PowerPaint (inpaint, object removal) and HiDiffusion (higher resolution for SD15 and SDXL)
- [**SDXL Prompt Styler**](https://github.com/twri/sdxl_prompt_styler) (⭐915 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 12*): SDXL Prompt Styler is a node that enables you to style prompts based on predefined templates stored in a JSON file.

- [**SeargeSDXL**](https://github.com/SeargeDP/SeargeSDXL) (⭐873 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 62*): Custom nodes for easier use of SDXL in ComfyUI including an img2img workflow that utilizes both the base and refiner checkpoints.
- [**☁️BizyAir Nodes**](https://github.com/siliconflow/BizyAir) (⭐842 *pushed 6 months ago, created 1 year, 8 months ago, issues 45*): [a/BizyAir](https://github.com/siliconflow/BizyAir) Comfy Nodes that can run in any environment.
- [**VNCCS - Visual Novel Character Creation Suite**](https://github.com/AHEKOT/ComfyUI_VNCCS) (⭐835 *pushed 7 days ago, created 5 months ago, issues 9*): VNCCS is a comprehensive tool for creating character sprites for visual novels.

- [**ComfyUI-MultiGPU**](https://github.com/pollockjj/ComfyUI-MultiGPU) (⭐833 *pushed 5 days ago, created 1 year, 3 months ago, issues 12*): This extension adds CUDA device selection to supported loader nodes in ComfyUI. By monkey-patching ComfyUI’s memory management, each model component (like UNet, Clip, or VAE) can be loaded on a specific GPU. Examples included are multi-GPU workflows for SDXL, FLUX, LTXVideo, and Hunyuan Video for both standard and GGUF loader nodes.
- [**ComfyUI YoloWorld-EfficientSAM**](https://github.com/ZHO-ZHO-ZHO/ComfyUI-YoloWorld-EfficientSAM) (⭐817 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 92*): Unofficial implementation of [a/YOLO-World + EfficientSAM](https://huggingface.co/spaces/SkalskiP/YOLO-World) & [a/YOLO-World](https://github.com/AILab-CVC/YOLO-World) for ComfyUI
- [**ComfyUI PhotoMaker (ZHO)**](https://github.com/ZHO-ZHO-ZHO/ComfyUI-PhotoMaker-ZHO) (⭐816 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 59*): Unofficial implementation of [a/PhotoMaker](https://github.com/TencentARC/PhotoMaker) for ComfyUI
- [**ComfyUI Ollama**](https://github.com/stavsap/comfyui-ollama) (⭐801 *pushed 5 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 49*): Custom ComfyUI Nodes for interacting with [a/Ollama](https://ollama.com/) using the [a/ollama python client](https://github.com/ollama/ollama-python).
- [**TTS Audio Suite**](https://github.com/diodiogod/TTS-Audio-Suite) (⭐792 *pushed 5 days ago, created 7 months ago, issues 62*): TTS Audio Suite - Universal multi-engine TTS extension for ComfyUI with unified architecture supporting ChatterBox, F5-TTS, and future engines like RVC. - [**Tiled sampling for ComfyUI**](https://github.com/BlenderNeko/ComfyUI_TiledKSampler) (⭐412 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 33*): This extension contains a tiled sampler for ComfyUI. It allows for denoising larger images by splitting it up into smaller tiles and denoising these. It tries to minimize any seams for showing up in the end result by gradually denoising all tiles one step at the time and randomizing tile positions for every step.

- [**KSampler for Wan 2.2 MoE for ComfyUI**](https://github.com/stduhpf/ComfyUI-WanMoeKSampler) (⭐236 *pushed 5 months ago, created 7 months ago, issues 18*): These nodes are made to support 'Mixture of Expert' Flow models with the architecture of Wan2.2 A14B (With a high noise expert and low noise expert). Instead of guessing the denoising step at which to swap from tyhe high noise model to the low noise model, this node automatically chanage to the low noise model when we reach the diffusion timestep at which the signal to noise ratio is supposed to be 1:1.

It can only be used with high noise for 6 steps, low noise for 2 steps, and a middle split step of 4 steps. It requires a unique LoRA, which is currently in training and undergoing refinement, and is only in the testing phase. This version offers multiple options for you to choose from, and my recommendation is to go with robust-smooth or even lower. Stay tuned for the official release.

- [**ComfyUI-LuminaWrapper**](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-LuminaWrapper) (⭐195 *pushed 1 year, 7 months ago, created 1 year, 9 months ago, issues 17*): ComfyUI wrapper nodes for Lumina models
- [**Plush-for-ComfyUI**](https://github.com/glibsonoran/Plush-for-ComfyUI) (⭐195 *pushed 8 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 0*): A suite of nodes that includes:  - Prompt enhancers/generators that employ remote AI services and local front-ends like: ChatGPT, Anthropic Claude, Groq, Gemini, LM Studio, Oobabooga, OpenRouter etc.  - An Image Generator that uses Dall_e 3.  - An image metadata extractor that extracts seed, prompt, cfg, size, denoise, etc from existing AI generated images and photo metadata (from exif data) from jpeg photographs.  A tagger that appends text (tags) to the beginning, end and/or middle of a text block.  Image and text multiplexer utilility.  A text block remover that removes text between two named tags.

The nodes utilize the [a/face parsing model](https://huggingface.co/jonathandinu/face-parsing) to provide detailed segmantation of face. To improve face segmantation accuracy, [a/yolov8 face model](https://huggingface.co/Bingsu/adetailer/) is used to first extract face from an image. There are also auxiliary nodes for image and mask processing. A guided filter is also provided for skin smoothing.

- [**ComfyUI-MimicBrush**](https://github.com/AIFSH/ComfyUI-MimicBrush) (⭐117 *pushed 1 year, 9 months ago, created 1 year, 9 months ago, issues 11*): a comfyui custom node for [a/MimicBrush](https://github.com/ali-vilab/MimicBrush),then inpainting with reference image.
- [**V-Express: Conditional Dropout for Progressive Training of Portrait Video Generation**](https://github.com/tiankuan93/ComfyUI-V-Express) (⭐117 *pushed 1 year, 8 months ago, created 1 year, 9 months ago, issues 14*): [Original] In the field of portrait video generation, the use of single images to generate portrait videos has become increasingly prevalent. A common approach involves leveraging generative models to enhance adapters for controlled generation. However, control signals can vary in strength, including text, audio, image reference, pose, depth map, etc. Among these, weaker conditions often struggle to be effective due to interference from stronger conditions, posing a challenge in balancing these conditions. In our work on portrait video generation, we identified audio signals as particularly weak, often overshadowed by stronger signals such as pose and original image. However, direct training with weak signals often leads to difficulties in convergence. To address this, we propose V-Express, a simple method that balances different control signals through a series of progressive drop operations. Our method gradually enables effective control by weak conditions, thereby achieving generation capabilities that simultaneously take into account pose, input image, and audio.
- [**ComfyUI Model Downloader**](https://github.com/ciri/comfyui-model-downloader) (⭐116 *pushed 6 days ago, created 1 year, 11 months ago, issues 6*): This node allows downloading models directly within ComfyUI for easier use and integration.

- [**ComfyUI-APQNodes**](https://github.com/AIPOQUE/ComfyUI-APQNodes) (⭐111 *pushed 1 year, 4 months ago, created 1 year, 4 months ago, issues 5*): Without fine-tuning, FLUX.1 Dev model cannot understand exact color codes. However, it is known that FLUX.1 Dev can repeatedly produce certain colors with certain prompt(color name). Fortunately, on CIVITAI, [a/“novuschroma” shared 155 pre-tested color names](https://civitai.com/models/879997/color-wildcards-for-flux-and-sdxl) that FLUX.1 Dev can handle. Thanks to his resource, color palette consists exclusively of 155 colors can be configured. ‘ColorPalette’ node from ComfyUI APQNodes converts input hex color code to the most similar color name(from pre-tested 155 color names) of which FLUX.1 Dev is aware.

(Description by CC)
- [**ComfyUI-Lux3D**](https://github.com/manycore-research/ComfyUI-Lux3D) (⭐99 *pushed 20 days ago, created a month ago, issues 0*): A ComfyUI extension providing nodes for generating 3D models from images and rendering/visualizing 3D assets within your workflow.
- [**ComfyUI-J**](https://github.com/Jannchie/ComfyUI-J) (⭐98 *pushed 11 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 12*): This is a completely different set of nodes than Comfy's own KSampler series. This set of nodes is based on Diffusers, which makes it easier to import models, apply prompts with weights, inpaint, reference only, controlnet, etc.
- [**Prompt Injection Node for ComfyUI**](https://github.com/DataCTE/prompt_injection) (⭐98 *pushed 7 months ago, created 1 year, 9 months ago, issues 4*): This custom node for ComfyUI allows you to inject specific prompts at specific blocks of the Stable Diffusion UNet, providing fine-grained control over the generated image. It is based on the concept that the content/subject understanding of the model is primarily contained within the MID0 and MID1 blocks, as demonstrated in the B-Lora (Content Style implicit separation) paper. Features.
- [**Comfyui-LatentUtils**](https://github.com/lrzjason/Comfyui-LatentUtils) (⭐98 *pushed 3 months ago, created 3 months ago, issues 1*): Custom ComfyUI node performing selective latent denoising and detail enhancement using Fourier Transform (FFT) to separate and enhance image frequencies while suppressing noise. (Description by CC)
- [**CRT-Nodes**](https://github.com/plugcrypt/CRT-Nodes) (⭐98 *pushed 10 days ago, created 1 year, 5 months ago, issues 5*): CRT-Nodes is a collection of custom nodes for ComfyUI

- [**ComfyUI-IPAnimate**](https://github.com/Chan-0312/ComfyUI-IPAnimate) (⭐76 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 9*): This is a project that generates videos frame by frame based on IPAdapter+ControlNet. Unlike [a/Steerable-motion](https://github.com/banodoco/Steerable-Motion), we do not rely on AnimateDiff. This decision is primarily due to the fact that the videos generated by AnimateDiff are often blurry. Through frame-by-frame control using IPAdapter+ControlNet, we can produce higher definition and more controllable videos.

- [**ComfyUI-AniSora**](https://github.com/Yuan-ManX/ComfyUI-AniSora) (⭐51 *pushed 9 months ago, created 10 months ago, issues 9*): ComfyUI-AniSora is now available in ComfyUI, Index-AniSora is the most powerful open-source animated video generation model. - [**ComfyUI Sequential Image Loader**](https://github.com/bruefire/ComfyUI-SeqImageLoader) (⭐47 *pushed 8 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 3*): This is an extension node for ComfyUI that allows you to load frames from a video in bulk and perform masking and sketching on each frame through a GUI.
- [**DeepExtract**](https://github.com/abdozmantar/ComfyUI-DeepExtract) (⭐47 *pushed 6 months ago, created 1 year, 5 months ago, issues 6*): DeepExtract is a powerful and efficient tool designed to separate vocals and sounds from audio files, providing an enhanced experience for musicians, producers, and audio engineers. With DeepExtract, you can quickly and effectively isolate vocals or instruments from mixed audio tracks, facilitating tasks like remixing, karaoke preparation, or audio analysis.
- [**ComfyUI Ovi Node**](https://github.com/HM-RunningHub/ComfyUI_RH_Ovi) (⭐47 *pushed 5 months ago, created 5 months ago, issues 4*): A custom node for ComfyUI that integrates Ovi for synchronized video+audio generation from text or image inputs.
- [**ComfyUI-Flux-TryOff**](https://github.com/asutermo/ComfyUI-Flux-TryOff) (⭐47 *pushed 1 year, 16 days ago, created 1 year, 2 months ago, issues 3*): Try Off for ComfyUI using Flux and CatVTON.
- [**EsesImageResize**](https://github.com/quasiblob/ComfyUI-EsesImageResize) (⭐47 *pushed 5 months ago, created 8 months ago, issues 4*): The 'Eses Image Resize' node offers comprehensive image resizing capabilities within ComfyUI. It supports various scaling modes including scaling by a specific ratio, target megapixels, or directly to fixed dimensions. The node provides framing options to handle aspect ratio changes, allowing users to 'Crop to Fit' (fill) the target frame or 'Fit to Frame' (letterbox) the image with a customizable fill color. It also generates and outputs a corresponding mask, with control over the letterbox area's color (black or white) within the mask.
- [**ComfyUI-FlashVSR_Stable**](https://github.com/naxci1/ComfyUI-FlashVSR_Stable) (⭐47 *pushed a month ago, created 3 months ago, issues 2*): High-performance Video Super Resolution for ComfyUI with VRAM optimization.
- [**ComfyUI DFloat11 Extended**](https://github.com/mingyi456/ComfyUI-DFloat11-Extended) (⭐47 *pushed 15 days ago, created 5 months ago, issues 7*): Fork of the official DF11 ComfyUI custom node that supports a wider variety of model architectures, and provides fixes for compatibility with recent ComfyUI versions. Also, LoRAs are supported for select model architectures.
- [**Stable Projectorz Bridge**](https://github.com/tianlang0704/ComfyUI-StableProjectorzBridge) (⭐46 *pushed 1 year, 3 months ago, created 1 year, 9 months ago, issues 6*): This custom nodes enables Stable Projectorz to work with ComfyUI Directly.
- [**Efficiency Nodes ExtendeD**](https://github.com/NyaamZ/efficiency-nodes-ED) (⭐46 *pushed 4 months ago, created 1 year, 6 months ago, issues 8*): Expansion of Efficiency Nodes for ComfyUI. Significant UX improvements.[w/NOTE: This node requires [a/efficiency-nodes-comfyui](https://github.com/jags111/efficiency-nodes-comfyui) and [a/ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts](https://github.com/pythongosssss/ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts); it also requires start.bat to run.]
- [**ComfyUI_Slider_Sidebar**](https://github.com/Kinglord/ComfyUI_Slider_Sidebar) (⭐46 *pushed 1 year, 5 months ago, created 1 year, 6 months ago, issues 6*): A custom node that adds a UI element to the sidebar allowing easy access, navigation, and use of a massive collection (100+) of LECO (Slider) LoRAs. LECOs are an amazing tool to generate variance in your output with a minimal impact to consistency, i.e. deviating form your prompt. They can also allow you access to control parts of your image without taking up CLIP space, saving your token weights for more valuable keywords. If you haven't used them, there's never been a better time to try!
- [**ComfyUI_CGAnimittaTools**](https://github.com/cganimitta/ComfyUI_CGAnimittaTools) (⭐46 *pushed 11 months ago, created 11 months ago, issues 0*): A series of functional custom plugins, including Blender Bridge, Extract the value of any list type data, read text files, etc.
- [**GeminiBanana for ComfyUI**](https://github.com/PenguinTeo/Comfyui-GeminiBanana) (⭐46 *pushed 4 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 2*): GeminiBanana is a custom node for ComfyUI based on the Gemini API. It allows you to call Gemini inside ComfyUI workflows to generate text, parse images, or perform multimodal interactions, greatly enhancing workflow automation and creative capabilities.
- [**ComfyUI-EsesImageCompare**](https://github.com/quasiblob/ComfyUI-EsesImageCompare) (⭐46 *pushed a month ago, created 8 months ago, issues 2*): Interactive A/B image comparison node with a draggable slider to reveal one image over another. Includes difference and other blend modes for more detailed analysis, allowing one to spot changes in similar images. Node also outputs a passthrough image of input A, and a grayscale difference mask.

These nodes are essential for running ShellAgent apps with ComfyUI, but they can also be used independently to specify input/output variables and their requirements explicitly.

- [**ComfyUI-Loop-image**](https://github.com/WainWong/ComfyUI-Loop-image) (⭐41 *pushed 11 months ago, created 1 year, 2 months ago, issues 4*): ComfyUI Loop Image is a node package specifically designed for image loop processing. It provides two main processing modes: Batch Image Processing and Single Image Processing, along with supporting image segmentation and merging functions.
- [**ComfyUI-Qwen-Omni**](https://github.com/SXQBW/ComfyUI-Qwen-Omni) (⭐41 *pushed 9 months ago, created 11 months ago, issues 7*): ComfyUI-Qwen-Omni is the first ComfyUI plugin that supports end-to-end multimodal interaction, enabling seamless joint generation and editing of text, images, and audio. Without intermediate steps, with just one operation, the model can simultaneously understand and process multiple input modalities, generating coherent text descriptions and voice outputs, providing an unprecedentedly smooth experience for AI creation.
- [**Olm Curve Editor for ComfyUI**](https://github.com/o-l-l-i/ComfyUI-Olm-CurveEditor) (⭐41 *pushed 7 months ago, created 9 months ago, issues 2*): A single-purpose, multi-channel curve editor for ComfyUI, providing precise color control over R, G, B, and Luma channels directly within the node graph. It’s a focused, lightweight, and standalone solution built specifically for one task: applying color curves cleanly and efficiently.
- [**ComfyUI-EsesImageEffectLevels**](https://github.com/quasiblob/ComfyUI-EsesImageEffectLevels) (⭐41 *pushed 7 months ago, created 8 months ago, issues 3*): The 'Eses Image Effect Levels' is a ComfyUI custom node that provides a real-time levels adjustment tool directly within the user interface. It allows for interactive control over the tonal range of both images and masks, using a GPU-accelerated PyTorch backend for near instant feedback.
- [**ComfyUI Face Similarity**](https://github.com/chflame163/ComfyUI_FaceSimilarity) (⭐40 *pushed 11 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 6*): A custom node for ComfyUI. It compare two images to rate facial similarity.
- [**ComfyUI-sudo-latent-upscale**](https://github.com/styler00dollar/ComfyUI-sudo-latent-upscale) (⭐40 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 3*): Directly upscaling inside the latent space. Model was trained for SD1.5 and drawn content. Might add new architectures or update models at some point. This took heavy inspriration from [city96/SD-Latent-Upscaler](https://github.com/city96/SD-Latent-Upscaler) and [Ttl/ComfyUi_NNLatentUpscale](https://github.com/Ttl/ComfyUi_NNLatentUpscale). 
- [**ComfUI-EGAdapterMadAssistant**](https://github.com/11dogzi/ComfUI-EGAdapterMadAssistant) (⭐40 *pushed 1 year, 7 months ago, created 1 year, 8 months ago, issues 2*): This is a hierarchical auxiliary project of the IPAdapter project, which uses a slider to quickly control the hierarchical weights and add fully random and semi random modes
- [**ComfyUI-UniAnimate**](https://github.com/AIFSH/ComfyUI-UniAnimate) (⭐40 *pushed 1 year, 8 months ago, created 1 year, 9 months ago, issues 6*): a comfyui custom node for [a/UniAnimate](https://github.com/ali-vilab/UniAnimate)
- [**Basic data handling**](https://github.com/StableLlama/ComfyUI-basic_data_handling) (⭐40 *pushed 6 hours ago, created 10 months ago, issues 0*): Basic Python functions for manipulating data that every programmer is used to. Currently supported: BOOLEAN, FLOAT, INT, STRING and data lists.
- [**ComfyUI-Unfake-Pixels**](https://github.com/tauraloke/ComfyUI-Unfake-Pixels) (⭐40 *pushed 7 months ago, created 8 months ago, issues 2*): A ComfyUI node for pixel art scaling. Automatically detects the pixel scale using an edge-aware method (Sobel filter + voting on tiles) and downscales the image to that pixel size, reducing color palette.
- [**ComfyUI-CRZnodes**](https://github.com/CoreyCorza/ComfyUI-CRZnodes) (⭐40 *pushed 6 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 4*): Dashboard Nodes for Comfy
- [**ComfyUI PickScore Nodes**](https://github.com/Zuellni/ComfyUI-PickScore-Nodes) (⭐39 *pushed 1 year, 6 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 0*): Image scoring nodes for ComfyUI using PickScore with a batch of images to predict which ones fit a given prompt the best.
- [**FaceSwap**](https://github.com/imb101/ComfyUI-FaceSwap) (⭐39 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 5*): Nodes:FaceSwapNode. Very basic custom node to enable face swapping in ComfyUI. (roop)

The inputs on the Preprocessor  chooser should not be renamed if you intend to accept image inputs wirelessly through UE nodes. It can be done, but the send node input regex for each controlnet preprocessor column must also be changed.

- [**ComfyUI-decadetw-auto-prompt-llm**](https://github.com/xlinx/ComfyUI-decadetw-auto-prompt-llm) (⭐29 *pushed 1 year, 1 month ago, created 1 year, 7 months ago, issues 5*): NODES: Auto-LLM-Text-Vision, Auto-LLM-Text, Auto-LLM-Vision

- [**ComfyUI_pytorch360convert**](https://github.com/ProGamerGov/ComfyUI_pytorch360convert) (⭐29 *pushed 6 months ago, created 1 year, 1 month ago, issues 2*): A collection of custom nodes for working with and converting between and working with 360 degree equirectangular images, cubemap, and perspective images. Also includes Circular padding Conv2d options for models and VAEs, along with nodes to fix seams and polar artifacts. Panoramic 360 images are also sometimes known as VR photography (virtual reality), HDRI environments (ex: skyboxes), image spheres, spherical images, 360 pano.
- [**Custom Graph Sigma for ComfyUI**](https://github.com/JoeNavark/comfyui_custom_sigma_editor) (⭐29 *pushed 7 months ago, created 10 months ago, issues 2*): Custom Graph Sigma is a ComfyUI custom node that provides an interactive spline-based curve editor for visually creating and exporting custom sigma schedules. This is especially useful for controlling the noise schedule or custom step values in diffusion models and other workflows that use a sequence of values over time or steps.
- [**ComfyUI Deadline Submission**](https://github.com/doubletwisted/ComfyUI-Deadline-Plugin) (⭐29 *pushed 2 months ago, created 10 months ago, issues 6*): ComfyUI plugin for submitting workflows to Thinkbox Deadline for distributed rendering. Enables render farm distribution with configurable job settings, batch processing, and automatic seed variation.
- [**Comfyui CoTracker Node**](https://github.com/s9roll7/comfyui_cotracker_node) (⭐29 *pushed 9 months ago, created 9 months ago, issues 1*): This is a node that outputs tracking results of a grid or specified points using CoTracker. It can be directly connected to the WanVideo ATI Tracks Node.

Supports text-to-image, image-to-image, and multi-image-to-image generation. Supports concurrent generation.
- [**ComfyUI-RBG-SmartSeedVariance**](https://github.com/RamonGuthrie/ComfyUI-RBG-SmartSeedVariance) (⭐29 *pushed a month ago, created 3 months ago, issues 0*): Advanced seed diversity enhancement for ComfyUI with intelligent noise injection and directional biasing.

- [**ComfyUI-Attention-Optimizer**](https://github.com/D-Ogi/ComfyUI-Attention-Optimizer) (⭐29 *pushed a month ago, created 2 months ago, issues 1*): Automatically benchmark and optimize attention in diffusion models. 1.5-2x speedup on RTX 4090, up to 4x on video models.
- [**Gridswapper**](https://github.com/kinfolk0117/ComfyUI_GridSwapper) (⭐28 *pushed 1 year, 4 months ago, created 1 year, 4 months ago, issues 2*): Gridswapper takes a batch of latents and spreads them over the necessary amount of grids. It then automatically shuffles the images in the grids for each step. So, a batch of 12 latents for a 2x2 grid will generate 3 grid images in each step. It will then shuffle around the images for the next step. This makes it possible for all images to influence the others during the denoising process. This approach works well for generating 2-4 grids.

Toggle web search on/off for pure LLM mode.

Occasionally, strange issues occur, such as multiple queues being added at once, while other times it works perfectly fine. The potential causes are still under investigation.

- [**ComfyUI-DFloat11**](https://github.com/LeanModels/ComfyUI-DFloat11) (⭐16 *pushed 6 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 7*): This repository provides the ComfyUI plugin for DFloat11 models. DFloat11 reduces model size by more than 30% while producing bit-for-bit identical outputs to the original. Unlike quantization techniques which trade quality for size, DFloat11 is a lossless compression method, preserving model output quality fully while supporting efficient inference.

The main function is to remove the grid patterns on the image, and it can also perform high-pass filtering and low-pass filtering. The detailed workflow is shown in the figure below. The PNG file contains the ComfyUI workflow.The working principle is similar to the FFT filter in Photoshop.

- [**MW-ComfyUI_EraX-WoW-Turbo**](https://github.com/billwuhao/ComfyUI_EraX-WoW-Turbo) (⭐14 *pushed 10 months ago, created 1 year, 4 days ago, issues 2*): Super fast multilingual speech recognition model based on Whisper Large-v3 Turbo. A node for ComfyUI.

- [**ComfyUI_depthMapOperation**](https://github.com/chri002/ComfyUI_depthMapOperation) (⭐14 *pushed 9 months ago, created 1 year, 11 days ago, issues 0*): A simple set of nodes to generate a point cloud from an image and its depth map, perform transformations and some basic operations.
- [**comfyui-OreX**](https://github.com/orex2121/comfyui-OreX) (⭐14 *pushed 3 months ago, created a year ago, issues 6*): comfyui-OreX is a set of nodes for using LLM models via a free API.
- [**ComfyUI Custom Dia**](https://github.com/nobrainX2/comfyUI-customDia) (⭐14 *pushed 9 months ago, created 11 months ago, issues 3*): This is a ComfyUI integration of the [a/Dia TTS model](https://github.com/nari-labs/dia/). Many thanks to nari-labs for their fantastic work.
- [**ComfyUI Warper Nodes**](https://github.com/AIWarper/ComfyUI-WarperNodes) (⭐14 *pushed 2 months ago, created 9 months ago, issues 3*): NODES: DWPose Scaler (Warper), Mouth Mask from Pose (Warper), Facial Part Mask from Pose (Warper), Smart Video Batcher (Warper), Get Batch By Index (Warper), Smart Overlapping Batcher (Warper), Flow Visualizer (Warper), Preprocess for Target (Warper), Crop and Restore (Warper), Aspect Ratio Resolution (Warper)
- [**ComfyUI Cache Cleaner Node**](https://github.com/AIToldMeTo/comfyui-cache-cleaner) (⭐14 *pushed 6 months ago, created 1 year, 3 months ago, issues 0*): A custom node for ComfyUI that provides the ability to clear the cache directly from your workflow.
- [**Olm LGG (Lift, Gamma, Gain) for ComfyUI**](https://github.com/o-l-l-i/ComfyUI-Olm-LGG) (⭐14 *pushed 10 days ago, created 8 months ago, issues 0*): A visual, interactive Lift, Gamma, Gain color correction node for ComfyUI, tailored for precise color grading workflows.
- [**ComfyUI-EsesImageTransform**](https://github.com/quasiblob/ComfyUI-EsesImageTransform) (⭐14 *pushed 8 months ago, created 8 months ago, issues 2*): Apply 2D transformations to images and masks within ComfyUI. Zoom, position, scale, flip, rotate, squash and stretch the input content. Tile images to create patterns (supports alpha channels). Fill options for managing canvas areas exposed by transformations. Apply masks to RGB images and invert mask inputs or outputs. No extra dependencies.
- [**LM Studio Tools for ComfyUI**](https://github.com/Hazukiaoi/ComfyUI-LM_Studio_Tools) (⭐14 *pushed 8 months ago, created 8 months ago, issues 4*): This is a custom node pack designed for ComfyUI that seamlessly integrates the powerful LM Studio into your workflow, enabling you to perform a variety of tasks such as text generation and image understanding (Vision) using locally run LLMs.
- [**Best Resolution**](https://github.com/Lex-DRL/ComfyUI-BestResolution) (⭐14 *pushed 5 months ago, created 8 months ago, issues 0*): QoL nodes for semi-automatic calculation of the best (most optimal) sampling resolution 
- [**ComfyUI-FLUX2-JSON**](https://github.com/MushroomFleet/ComfyUI-FLUX2-JSON) (⭐14 *pushed 2 months ago, created 3 months ago, issues 2*): A comprehensive suite of custom nodes for building structured JSON prompts for FLUX.2 image generation with precision and control.
- [**Thought Bubble**](https://github.com/matthewfriedrichs/ComfyUI-ThoughtBubble) (⭐14 *pushed 2 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 0*): ThoughtBubble is a custom node for ComfyUI that provides an interactive canvas to build and manage your prompts in a more visual and organized way. Think of it as a whiteboard for your ideas, allowing you to link different concepts, create conditional logic, and dynamically generate prompts using a powerful set of commands.
- [**Vantage-Nodes**](https://github.com/vantagewithai/Vantage-Nodes) (⭐14 *pushed 10 days ago, created 2 months ago, issues 2*): This release introduces Vantage Nodes, a powerful utility and infrastructure node pack for ComfyUI, designed for advanced workflows, batch processing, and experimental pipelines.
- [**RC Image Compositor**](https://github.com/kj863257/ComfyUI_RC_Image_Compositor) (⭐14 *pushed 4 months ago, created 5 months ago, issues 0*): A comprehensive ComfyUI plugin suite that brings professional Photoshop-style layer effects and advanced compositing capabilities. Features modular architecture, 24 blend modes, and enhanced positioning system.
- [**ComfyUI-SocksLatentPatcher**](https://github.com/synystersocks/ComfyUI-SocksLatentPatcher) (⭐14 *pushed 5 months ago, created 5 months ago, issues 3*): This node circumnavigates the loss of detail, saturation/desaturation for infinite length video generation, the node bypasses the vae decode and directly patches the latent tensor. experimental covering i2v and vace extend.
- [**ComfyUI Text Processor**](https://github.com/rookiestar28/ComfyUI_Text_Processor) (⭐14 *pushed a month ago, created 4 months ago, issues 0*): The ultimate text processing suite for ComfyUI. - [**Refocus - Generative Refocusing**](https://github.com/EricRollei/comfyui-refocus) (⭐14 *pushed 2 months ago, created 2 months ago, issues 0*): ComfyUI nodes for Genfocus generative refocusing. Features DeblurNet (restore all-in-focus images), BokehNet (create realistic depth-of-field/bokeh effects), DepthPro depth estimation, and defocus map utilities. Uses FLUX.1-dev with specialized LoRA adapters.

- [**LiquidTime - by PabloGFX**](https://github.com/lazniak/LiquidTime-Interpolation) (⭐13 *pushed 11 months ago, created 1 year, 4 months ago, issues 0*): LiquidTime is a simple yet powerful frame interpolation node for ComfyUI. A must-have tool for AI animation and video creation that lets you shape time like liquid.

- [**Image to Painting and Inspyrenet Assistant Nodes**](https://github.com/Isi-dev/ComfyUI-Img2PaintingAssistant) (⭐13 *pushed 5 months ago, created 1 year, 6 months ago, issues 1*): These are ComfyUI nodes to assist in converting images to paintings and to assist the Inspyrenet Rembg node to totally remove, or replace with a color, the original background from images so that the background does not reappear in videos or in nodes that do not retain the alpha channel in rgba images.

- [**ComfyUI-ChatterboxTTS**](https://github.com/Yuan-ManX/ComfyUI-ChatterboxTTS) (⭐13 *pushed 9 months ago, created 9 months ago, issues 5*): ComfyUI-ChatterboxTTS is now available in ComfyUI, Chatterbox TTS is the first production-grade open-source TTS model.

- [**ComfyUI-DiscordSend**](https://github.com/AEmotionStudio/ComfyUI-DiscordSend) (⭐13 *pushed 2 hours ago, created 1 year, 19 days ago, issues 0*): A ComfyUI extension that enables seamless sharing of AI-generated images and videos directly to Discord.
- [**ComfyUI OneReward Node**](https://github.com/HM-RunningHub/ComfyUI_RH_OneReward) (⭐13 *pushed 6 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 5*): A custom node for ComfyUI that integrates OneReward model for high-quality image inpainting, outpainting, and object removal.
- [**ComfyUI_SpideyReroute**](https://github.com/SKBv0/ComfyUI_SpideyReroute) (⭐13 *pushed 3 months ago, created 3 months ago, issues 2*): Just a reroute node with a tiny twist.
- [**ComfyUI_SimpleButcher**](https://github.com/KLL535/ComfyUI_SimpleButcher) (⭐13 *pushed 7 months ago, created 1 year, 2 months ago, issues 0*): Node to automate batch generation with randomize prompts from text files. It mimics Forge's functionality, allowing you to combine text elements and LoRA. The node supports writing LoRA in any order within a text file using formats like <lora:name:1.0> or <lora:name:unet=1.0:te=0.75>, without needing separate nodes. The node understands LoRA names in Forge's style, when the name is not the filename, but the internal name from the metadata.
- [**comfyui-finegrain**](https://github.com/finegrain-ai/comfyui-finegrain) (⭐13 *pushed 6 months ago, created 1 year, 27 days ago, issues 4*): ComfyUI custom nodes to interact with the Finegrain API.
- [**NoteManager**](https://github.com/Danteday/ComfyUI-NoteManager) (⭐13 *pushed 11 months ago, created 11 months ago, issues 8*): A powerful extension for ComfyUI that enables adding notes to many node in your workflow. - [**ComfyUI-WarpedToolset**](https://github.com/WarpedAnimation/ComfyUI-WarpedToolset) (⭐13 *pushed a month ago, created 1 year, 2 days ago, issues 0*): A toolset for Hunyuan Video (mainly), with some additional nodes applicable to Framepack Video and WAN Video

- [**ComfyUI Qwen Image Size Picker**](https://github.com/rzgarespo/ComfyUI-qwen-image-size-picker) (⭐13 *pushed a month ago, created 7 months ago, issues 0*): An empty latent size picker with support for Qwen Image, SDXL, and Flux models.

- [**pfg-ComfyUI**](https://github.com/laksjdjf/pfg-ComfyUI) (⭐12 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 0*): ComfyUI version of https://github.com/laksjdjf/pfg-webui. (To use this extension, you need to download the required model file from **Install Models**)
- [**SRL's nodes**](https://github.com/seanlynch/srl-nodes) (⭐12 *pushed 1 year, 8 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 4*): Nodes: SRL Conditional Interrupt, SRL Format String, SRL Eval, SRL Filter Image List. This is a collection of nodes I find useful. Note that at least one module allows execution of arbitrary code. Do not use any of these nodes on a system that allow untrusted users to control workflows or inputs.[w/WARNING: The custom nodes in this extension are vulnerable to **security risks** because they allow the execution of arbitrary code through the workflow]
- [**ComfyUI_NoxinNodes**](https://github.com/noxinias/ComfyUI_NoxinNodes) (⭐12 *pushed 1 year, 10 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 4*): Nodes: Noxin Complete Chime, Noxin Scaled Resolutions, Load from Noxin Prompt Library, Save to Noxin Prompt Library

- [**Jovi_Colorizer**](https://github.com/Amorano/Jovi_Colorizer) (⭐12 *pushed 10 months ago, created 1 year, 25 days ago, issues 2*): Colorize ComfyUI nodes with defaults per node, node category or via regex filtering.
- [**Skoogeer-Noise**](https://github.com/ttulttul/Skoogeer-Noise) (⭐12 *pushed 25 days ago, created 3 months ago, issues 1*): Noise, conditioning, and perturbation utility nodes for ComfyUI (procedural noise, mesh drag, latent channel stats preview).

- [**comfyui_ab_sampler**](https://github.com/bmad4ever/comfyui_ab_samplercustom) (⭐11 *pushed 1 year, 6 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 2*): Experimental sampler node. Sampling alternates between A and B inputs until only one remains, starting with A. B steps run over a 2x2 grid, where 3/4's of the grid are copies of the original input latent. When the optional mask is used, the region outside the defined roi is copied from the original latent at the end of every step.

- [**ComfyUI_AIIA**](https://github.com/havvk/ComfyUI_AIIA) (⭐11 *pushed 30 days ago, created 9 months ago, issues 0*): Tired of OOM errors and tedious file management? The AIIA Node Suite delivers the ultimate workflow overhaul, headlined by the AIIA Media Browser: a high-performance file hub fully integrated into ComfyUI. Instantly preview images, videos, and audio, and experience ultimate smoothness thanks to smart caching and virtual scrolling, even with tens of thousands of files. It also features a powerful fullscreen viewer, rich tooltip previews, and flexible sorting. Alongside the browser, our Video Combine node fundamentally solves memory bottlenecks in long video generation. By streaming frames from disk, you can create videos of virtually unlimited length, making OOM errors a thing of the past. The suite also includes OOM-safe FLOAT video generation, advanced audio processing, and other utilities, providing a complete end-to-end solution from content creation to asset management.

- [**ComfyUI-Stereopsis**](https://github.com/IsItDanOrAi/ComfyUI-Stereopsis) (⭐9 *pushed 8 months ago, created 2 years ago, issues 3*): This initiative represents a solo venture dedicated to integrating a stereopsis effect within ComfyUI (Stable Diffusion). Presently, the project is focused on the refinement of node categorization within a unified framework, as it is in the early stages of development. However, it has achieved functionality in a fundamental capacity. By processing a video through the Side-by-Side (SBS) node and applying Frame Delay to one of the inputs, it facilitates the creation of a stereopsis effect. This effect is compatible with any Virtual Reality headset that supports SBS video playback, offering a practical application in immersive media experiences.

- [**ComfyUI-aihub-workflow-exposer**](https://github.com/otavanopisto/ComfyUI-aihub-workflow-exposer) (⭐7 *pushed 2 months ago, created 7 months ago, issues 2*): Custom nodes for ComfyUI in order to expose AI workflows to external applications (particularly image, video and audio editors) so workflows can be integrated as plugins
- [**ComfyUI Image to Video Inserter**](https://github.com/Yeq6X/ComfyUI-image-to-video-inserter) (⭐7 *pushed 4 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 2*): A ComfyUI custom node that inserts images into videos.
- [**ComfyUI Multi-Analysis Heatmaps**](https://github.com/Justify87/ComfyUI-Multi-Analysis-Heatmaps) (⭐7 *pushed a month ago, created 6 months ago, issues 0*): A custom ComfyUI node for visual comparison of two images using multiple perceptual and mathematical methods. The goal: make hidden differences visible as colorful heatmaps, so you can see where an upscaler, denoiser, or diffusion model changed your image — even when your eyes can’t tell at first glance.
- [**ComfyUI-Qwen-Camera-Selector**](https://github.com/HallettVisual/ComfyUI-Qwen-Camera-Selector) (⭐7 *pushed 4 months ago, created 4 months ago, issues 3*): Simple camera prompt builder node for Qwen-Edit-2509 Multiple-Angles in ComfyUI.

Features 20x faster performance with TensorRT acceleration, automatic model downloading, customizable pose visualization, keypoint conversion, and video workflow integration.
- [**mute-bypass by node ID**](https://github.com/pixelpainter/comfyui-mute-bypass-by-ID) (⭐7 *pushed 8 days ago, created 3 months ago, issues 0*): 2 nodes for muting or bypassing a node by node ID. - [**Comfyui_StoryMem**](https://github.com/anveshane/Comfyui_StoryMem) (⭐7 *pushed 2 months ago, created 2 months ago, issues 2*): Custom ComfyUI nodes for StoryMem - Multi-shot long video storytelling with memory-conditioned video diffusion models.

- [**ComfyUI-MaskBatchPermutations**](https://github.com/curiousjp/ComfyUI-MaskBatchPermutations) (⭐5 *pushed 1 year, 9 months ago, created 1 year, 10 months ago, issues 2*): Permutes a mask batch to present possible additive combinations. Passing a mask batch (e.g. out of [a/SEGS to Mask Batch](https://github.com/ltdrdata/ComfyUI-Impact-Pack)) will return a new mask batch representing all the possible combinations of the included masks. So, a mask batch with two mask sections, 'A' and 'B', will return a batch containing an empty mask, an empty mask & A, an empty mask & B, and an empty mask & A & B.

- [**ComfyUI-HuggingFace**](https://github.com/huchukato/ComfyUI-HuggingFace) (⭐5 *pushed 23 days ago, created a month ago, issues 0*): HuggingFace model downloader for ComfyUI with advanced search and intelligent download system. - [**ComfyUI-mem-safe-wrapper**](https://github.com/MiddleKD/ComfyUI-mem-safe-wrapper) (⭐4 *pushed 1 year, 7 months ago, created 1 year, 7 months ago, issues 4*): ComfyUI's Smart Memory Management efficiently manages RAM, GPU memory, and garbage collection. This feature keeps frequently used models in memory to increase inference speed, and dynamically releases less important models when memory is low to optimize resources. However, not all ComfyUI custom node developers create nodes that are compatible with Smart memory management. This includes several impressive models. Mem-safe-wrapper is a custom node that wraps these model nodes to enable ComfyUI's Smart memory management capabilities.

- [**ComfyUI-SVDResizer**](https://github.com/ShmuelRonen/ComfyUI-SVDResizer) (⭐3 *pushed 1 year, 18 days ago, created 2 years ago, issues 1*): SVDResizer is a helper for resizing the source image, according to the sizes enabled in Stable Video Diffusion. The rationale behind the possibility of changing the size of the image in steps between the ranges of 576 and 1024, is the use of the greatest common denominator of these two numbers which is 64. SVD is lenient with resizing that adheres to this rule, so the chance of coherent video that is not the standard size of 576X1024 is greater. It is advisable to keep the value 1024 constant and play with the second size to maintain the stability of the result.
- [**ComfyUI-PixArt_XL**](https://github.com/ShmuelRonen/ComfyUI-PixArt_XL) (⭐3 *pushed 1 year, 6 days ago, created 1 year, 11 days ago, issues 3*): A ComfyUI extension that integrates PixArt-Alpha models directly into ComfyUI with advanced memory management.

- [**ComfyUI-JSON-Prompt**](https://github.com/fr0nky0ng/ComfyUI-JSON-Prompt) (⭐3 *pushed 3 months ago, created 4 months ago, issues 2*): Custom node for ComfyUI that generates JSON prompts from natural language descriptions to improve text-to-image generation quality. Supports local LLM integration via Ollama or Google Gemini API.
- [**Enhanced Image Composite Masked**](https://github.com/darkamenosa/comfy_inpaint_blend) (⭐3 *pushed 6 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 1*): Seamless inpainting for image-space models like Google Nano Banana and ByteDance Seedream 4. Fixes color mismatches using Poisson blending.
- [**Danbooru FAISS Search Nodes**](https://github.com/L33chKing/ComfyUI-danbooru-FAISS-search) (⭐3 *pushed 6 months ago, created 7 months ago, issues 2*): Use image to search similar images from danbooru using various methods. Notice: the optional API key will be saved to metadata if used
- [**ComfyUI-Concept-Diffusion**](https://github.com/Junst/ComfyUI-Concept-Diffusion) (⭐3 *pushed 6 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 0*): ConceptAttention: Diffusion Transformers Learn Highly Interpretable Features for ComfyUI
- [**ComfyUl-UCloud**](https://github.com/ucloud/comfyui-plugin) (⭐3 *pushed 2 months ago, created 8 months ago, issues 0*): This is a custom node for ComfyUI that allows you to use the UCloud API directly in ComfyUI. UCloud is a high-performance AI computing platform providing powerful image generation models and industry-leading inference speeds. It offers a wide range of AI model options, including popular text-to-image and image editing models, ready to use without local GPU setup.
- [**ComfyUI Prompt Iterator Extension**](https://github.com/BizaNator/ComfyUI_PromptIterator) (⭐3 *pushed 6 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 2*): A powerful custom node extension for ComfyUI that enables automatic iteration through multiple prompts with corresponding filename generation. Perfect for batch processing different variations like character face angles, poses, or any sequential prompt workflow.
- [**ComfyUI-Persistent-Queue**](https://github.com/co5dt/ComfyUI-Persistent-Queue) (⭐3 *pushed 5 months ago, created 5 months ago, issues 1*): CoA simple, friendly way to make your ComfyUI job queue survive restarts and crashes.
- [**ComfyUI Ino Nodes**](https://github.com/nobandegani/comfyui_ino_nodes) (⭐3 *pushed 11 hours ago, created 10 months ago, issues 1*): A collection of custom nodes for ComfyUI.

- [**ComfyUI-translate-offline**](https://github.com/Jairodaniel-17/ComfyUI-translate-offline) (⭐3 *pushed 2 months ago, created 5 months ago, issues 1*): ComfyUI-translate-offline is a custom node for ComfyUI designed to perform offline text translations using ONNX–based translation models from Hugging Face. The project enables integrating multilingual translations into ComfyUI workflows, focusing on text prompts and conditioning for CLIP models. It supports direct translation between configured language pairs as well as pivot translation via English when no direct model exists. It uses lazy model loading to optimize performance and a SQLite-based caching system to avoid repeated translations.

- [**ComfyUI MagicClip_Strength for SDXL**](https://github.com/311-code/ComfyUI-MagicClip_Strength) (⭐2 *pushed 1 year, 6 months ago, created 1 year, 6 months ago, issues 3*): This project allows you to adjust SDXL's two text encoder's strengths individually for clip_g (ViT-bigG) and clip_l (CLIP-ViT-L) within ComfyUI. (And other adjustments)
- [**ComfyUI_video-image-motion-transfer**](https://github.com/blob8/ComfyUI_video-image-motion-transfer) (⭐2 *pushed 6 months ago, created 6 months ago, issues 2*): Introduces a node that tries to approximate the entire video using it's first frame (that we stylize) by warping it using optical flow extracted from the video. First we do image-to-image using the reference video's first frame and a depth controlnet. The generated object doesn't have to closely resemble the reference like on the demo. Then the generated image and the video frames are fed into the node and it returns a warped video. No ai models are used by the node. The example workflow uses SDXL but you can get it to work with any arch if you manage i2i.

- [**JH XMP Metadata Nodes**](https://github.com/ComfyUI-JH/ComfyUI-JH-XMP-Metadata-Nodes) (⭐2 *pushed 1 year, 2 months ago, created 1 year, 3 months ago, issues 6*): These are custom nodes for ComfyUI for the loading and saving of metadata in XMP format. XMP metadata is embedded in the images created by these nodes; it travels along wherever the image does. Both macOS and Windows index XMP metadata automatically, making it searchable from the Finder on the Mac or the File Explorer in Windows. Apps like Photoshop or Lightroom (and presumably many others) expose XMP metadata and allow it to be edited.
